old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-ixdj","title":"[codereview-P2] Conference test lacks radio stress","description":"The test_500_node_conference in test_scale.py:337 only uses sim.add_node, set_position, remove_node. It bypasses the radio layer, medium simulation, collision detection, SCHC fragmentation, and RPL. Reference: test_medium.py and test_topology_scenarios.py:100+. random.seed(42) is good for repro.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-22T17:59:02.687238924Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T17:59:02.687238924Z","labels":["codereview"]}
